apiList.ipapiDesc: Free lookup API from IPIP.NET, a commercial IP database vendor. No registration required. Returns plain text (current IP + location). Only supports querying the visitor's own IP; does not support querying a specified IP address.
apiList.ipapiDescShort: IPIP.NET commercial IP database free API
apiList.ipapi1Desc: No registration, free to use. Rate limit: 45 requests/minute. Free tier is HTTP only (HTTPS requires paid plan). Supports lang=zh-CN parameter. Returns JSON/XML/CSV formats.
apiList.ipsbDesc: No registration, no explicit rate limit. Supports IPv4/IPv6. Returns JSON format. Accessible from China.
apiList.geojsioDesc: Open source and free, no registration. Supports IPv4/IPv6. Returns JSON format.

apiDetail.card1Desc: Supports IP address and domain lookup with automatic type detection. Returns detailed geolocation information. Recommended for all queries.
apiDetail.card2Desc: Returns the IP address of the incoming request. No parameters required.
apiDetail.card3Desc: Enter any IPv4/IPv6 address to retrieve detailed geolocation and ISP information.
apiDetail.card4Desc: Returns the request source IP and its geolocation as seen by the server. When accessed via a proxy, this shows the proxy's IP, not the real client IP.
apiDetail.card5Desc: Resolves the A records of a domain using public DNS servers and returns all IPv4 addresses.
apiDetail.card6Desc: Resolves the AAAA records of a domain using public DNS servers and returns all IPv6 addresses.
apiDetail.card7Desc: Returns version and source information for the currently used IP database.
apiDetail.card8Desc: Returns download status, file sizes, and last update times for each database file in the data directory.
apiDetail.card9Desc: Queries multiple IP addresses at once (up to 50). Returns results for each IP.
apiDetail.card10Desc: Returns page view and API call statistics, filterable by day / week / month / year.

errors.ipRequired: Please provide an IP address, e.g. /api/location?q=8.8.8.8
errors.invalidIP: Please provide a valid IP address, e.g. /api/location?q=8.8.8.8
errors.ipOrDomainRequired: Please provide an IP address or domain, e.g. /api/query?q=8.8.8.8
errors.batchRequired: Please provide an array of IP addresses, e.g. {"ips":["8.8.8.8","1.1.1.1"]}
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.noLocationFound: No geolocation data found for this IP
errors.domainNoRecord: No DNS records for this domain

apiDesc.ipip: Free lookup API from IPIP.NET, a commercial IP database vendor. No registration required. Returns plain text (current IP + location). Only supports visitor's own IP query; UA header required since 2024.
apiDesc.ip-api: No registration, free. Limit: 45 req/min. Free tier HTTP only; cannot be called from HTTPS pages due to browser security. Returns JSON/XML/CSV.
apiDesc.ip-sb: No registration, no explicit rate limit. Supports IPv4/IPv6. Returns JSON. Accessible from China.
apiDesc.geojsio: Free, no registration, no rate limit. Returns JSON/JSONP with ASN/coordinates/timezone/continent. Supports IPv4/IPv6.
apiDesc.ipapi-is: Free HTTPS API focused on security (proxy/VPN/TOR/datacenter detection). Returns JSON with ASN/company/abuse info.
apiDesc.iplocate-io: Free HTTPS API, no registration. Returns JSON with detailed geo/ASN/coordinates/timezone. Supports IPv4/IPv6.
apiDesc.freeipapi: Free HTTPS API, no registration. Rate limit: 60 req/min. Returns JSON with country/city/ISP/coordinates/timezone/ASN. Supports IPv4/IPv6.
apiDesc.ipinfo: Free tier 50,000 req/day. Token optional. Returns detailed geo/ASN/ISP with coordinates and timezone.
apiDesc.local: QQWry IP database (qqwry.ipdb). Local lookup, no rate limit. Supports IPv4/IPv6. No IP data sent to third parties.
